positive: A whimsical, stylized fox sitting atop a stack of antique books, looking directly at the viewer. The fox has rich, burnt orange fur and emerald green eyes. Surrounding elements include floating iridescent butterflies, delicate floral wreaths (like baby's breath and lavender), and abstract swirling cosmic dust patterns. The composition is highly symmetrical, designed for a central, clean print look. Style: Neo-whimsical illustration, detailed vector art aesthetic mixed with deep watercolor textures. Color palette: Deep indigo blues, dusty golds, burnt oranges, and vibrant teals. Lighting: Studio flash, dramatic and crisp. Composition: Perfect central symmetry, suitable for apparel print. Seamless edges and high contrast silhouette.
negative: blurry, ugly, text, watermark, low detail, artifacts, jpeg artifacts, extra limbs, mutated, bad anatomy, noise, monochrome, grayscales, logo, signature, copyright, dirty, smudges
